content.en:
Ye Tian swallowed this Eternal Enlightenment Flower, and his comprehension instantly broke some kind of shackles and raised it to an unimaginable level.

Ye Tian took advantage of this opportunity to begin to comprehend the innate eternal rules of the innate eternal life, and his understanding of the eternal rules improved at an incredible speed.

Gradually, Ye Tian's eternal rules began to change qualitatively.

But at this time, the effect of the first Eternal Enlightenment Flower was lost.

So, Ye Tian immediately took the second Eternal Enlightenment Flower and continued to comprehend the Innate Eternal Rules.

Finally, when the second Eternal Enlightenment Flower was about to lose its effect, Ye Tian comprehended the innate eternal rules.

Airplanes!!!!

The innate power eternal rules were engraved on Ye Tian's body, and he vaguely wanted to fuse with Ye Tian, but the fusion failed, after all, he was not a real eternal realm now, so there was no way to completely fuse with the eternal rules, let alone with the innate eternal rules.

But even if it was only engraved in his own body, it also allowed Ye Tian to control the eternal rules of innate power, and his strength exerted a shocking qualitative change.

"There is still an Eternal Enlightenment Flower left, don't use it yet, keep it!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, mastering the innate power eternal rule this time was just an innate eternal rule, which also allowed Ye Tian to break the shackles and step into the level of the innate eternal rule.

In the future, it will be much easier for him to comprehend other innate eternal rules, which is equivalent to one law and ten thousand laws.

Subsequently, Ye Tian had comprehended for some years, and his strength had still improved, but he was still a little far away from the realm of the Nine Folds Supreme.

However, his current conventional strength has already crushed the ordinary half-step Eternal Realm, and it is very good in the half-step Eternal Realm.

Moreover, the powerful fingers of the Eternal Realm were not very helpful to him, at most they could only increase their strength several times.

If he ascended to the Ninefold Supreme Realm, the powerful fingers of the Eternal Realm would be completely useless to him.

But this is a good thing, it is enough to prove that Ye Tian is getting stronger and stronger.

this day.

A big thing happened in the Source Sea, the Dragon Scale Temple, the top power in the Source Sea, was destroyed, and even the Dragon Scale Saint Realm was destroyed.

The point is that after the Dragon Scale Saint Realm was destroyed, it was discovered by other forces, and there was no distress message at all before that.

If an ordinary force is destroyed like this, it will be fine, the key is that the Dragon Scale Saint Realm is not weak, it is a real top power, with three half-step Eternal Realms, dozens of Ninefold Immortals, and the number of Supreme Beings has reached more than 100,000, which is a truly incomparably ancient force.

Soon, the news spread, and even Ye Tian heard about it.

"The Dragon Scale Sanctuary has been destroyed!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

And when the Void Source Palace's instrument spirit learned about it, it was also extremely shocked.

"Master, the Dragon Scale Temple is a very ancient force, although it has never been born in the Eternal Realm, but the years of existence have existed longer than the previous master, the Void Source Ancestor, although the founder of the Dragon Scale Temple has fallen in a long time, but the Sea Ancestor of the Dragon Scale Temple is very powerful, much stronger than the Void Source Ancestor, such a force has been silently extinguished, I am afraid that it involves a more powerful existence, and it may even involve the Eternal Realm. The machine spirit spoke.

"Forget it, this matter has nothing to do with us, naturally other forces will investigate. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Some more years passed, and the effects of the destruction of the Dragonscale Temple gradually dissipated.

But on this day, another force was destroyed.

This force is the Ten Thousand Ancient Sect, a force that rose from the sect, originally a sect force of eternal heaven and earth, and later gave birth to a powerful demon, who rose all the way, raising the Ten Thousand Ancient Sect to a level comparable to the powerful power of the Source Sea, and occupied a treasure land in the Source Sea, where a new Ten Thousand Ancient Sect was opened.

The Ten Thousand Ancient Sect is not as powerful as the Dragon Scale Temple, but there is also a half-step Eternal Realm, and there are many supreme beings in the sect.

But even so, the Ten Thousand Ancient Sect was completely destroyed.

In the days that followed, one force after another was wiped out silently, and there were even many of them who did not have a half-step Eternal Realm, only eight or nine supremes, but they were still targeted.

Originally, it was thought that this mysterious black hand was only targeting the top forces of the half-step Eternal Realm, but now the weaker forces have all suffered, so all the forces are panicking.

So, all the forces united to investigate.

On this day, the Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion held an inner enclosure meeting, and Ye Tian also received a summons.

Genjin Pavilion.

Ye Tian came here and sat in his seat.

Soon, the other members of the inner circle appeared one by one, but Gefei Yuanzu did not come.

One or two less members of the inner circle, and the twelve ancestors don't care.

Seeing that the members of the inner enclosure were almost there, the True River Sword Ancestor spoke, "Presumably you should have heard the news that the Dragon Scale Sanctuary and many forces have been destroyed, right?"

"I heard that!"

"Now many forces are more worried, and they don't even know what to do?"

"True River Sword Ancestor, do you know who the mysterious black hand is?"

"If I had known who the enemy was, I would have destroyed them. "

"Forget it, the Dragon Scale Temple has been killed silently, where is the opponent of the ordinary half-step Eternal Realm!"

......

The True River Sword Ancestor waved his hand to stop everyone from talking, and said by himself: "According to my understanding, the mastermind behind the scenes used an Eternal Origin Weapon, the Space-Time Hengsha Bead, which blocked the Eternal Heaven and Earth, and no information could be transmitted, and then he moved to destroy those forces. To be able to destroy a force like the Dragon Scale Sanctuary in a short period of time, either the Eternal Realm will make a move, or there will be a half-step Eternal Realm of the Extreme Realm and several top half-step Eternal Realms. "

"The half-step Eternal Realm of the Extreme Realm, there are not many in the entire Source Sea, right?"

An ordinary half-step Eternal Realm whispered.

"That's right, there aren't many Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realms in the entire Source Sea!" Feng Gu Origin Ancestor nodded, "Among our Twelve Ancestors of the Source Sea, there are only six Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realms, but there is also a difference between the Extreme Realm and the Extreme Realm. "

Extreme!

Ye Tian also knew the division of this level, mastered the innate eternal rules and his strength far exceeded the top eternal realm, that is, the extreme realm half-step eternal realm.

It is rumored that the Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm is also divided into the First Pole Realm, the Second Pole Realm, and the Third Pole Realm......

The highest is the Nine-Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm, but such a half-step Eternal Realm can even defeat the ordinary Eternal Realm, which is almost non-existent in this era.

The Twelve Ancestors of the Source God Pavilion have six Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realms, but they all belong to the One Extreme Realm, as for whether they have hidden strength, it is not clear.

However, the Source God Pavilion was an idle force and had no constraints, so it was no threat to many of the top powers.

At this time.

Some members of the inner circle even wondered if this matter was done by the Twelve Ancestors, but when they thought about the character of the Twelve Ancestors, they wouldn't have done so, but if this matter was not resolved for a day, the fear in their hearts still could not be erased.

At this time, the True River Sword Ancestor provided another important clue, which shocked the expressions of all the members of the inner circle.
